creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG

  Update Pidgin and friends to 2.7.0.  See
  http://developer.pidgin.im/wiki/ChangeLog for the list of changes.  Also,
  enable Tcl 8.5 support.
  
  PR:             146607
  Submitted by:   dougb
